verses.text: Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Hong maizumsak ngei kei in la, na thumanna tawh kei hong honkhia in
Na bil hong ngat in la, hong hon pak in! Ka belh ding suangpi hong hi in la, kei hong dal ding munkip muan'huai hong hi in
Nang pen ka suangpi leh ka munkip muan'huai na hi hi. Nangma min ngaihsutna tawh kei hong kha-in lam hong lak in la
keima belhpa na hih manin hong kisiahna ngenthang panin kei hong lakhia in
Nangma khutsungah keimah kong ki-ap hi. Topa, a thuman Pasian aw, keimah na hong hon ding hi
Mawkna milim a thupi ngaihsutte na mudah hi; ahih hangin keimah in Topa ka hong muang hi
Na itna kip hangin lungdamin ka kipak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thuakna mu khinin, ka kamsiatna-ah na hong don khin hi
Galte' khutsungah kei na hong pia kei a, mun tanzau-ah ka khe na dingsak hi
Topa aw, genthei ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Dahna hangin ka mit thuk a, ka lungsim leh ka pumpi zong gim mahmah ta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna dahna vive hi a, ka hunte khuisatna vive ahi hi. Ka gentheihna hangin ka tha kiamgawp ta a, ka guhte zong ngaam ta hi
Ka vengte khempeuh' nuihsat ka suak a, ka vengte tungah a cikzethuai ka hi a, ka meltheih khempeuhte' gimneih mi ka suak hi. Konglakah hong mute in kei hong peelin hong taisan uh hi
Misi bangin kei hong kiphawk nawnlo a, beel kitam khat tawh ka kibang lel ta hi
Ka galte' kihuauna ka za a, ka kiim ka pamah launa om hi. Kei hong langpangin amaute in vai hawmkhawm a, thah dingin kei hong sawm uh hi
Ahih hangin nang kong muang hi, Topa aw. Keima Pasian na hi hi
Keima nuntakna nangma khutsungah om hi. Keima galte leh kei a hong bawlsiate' khutsung panin kei hong honkhia in
Na nasempa tungah na mai hong taangsak in la, na itna kip tawh kei hong hon in
Topa aw, nangma tung panin huhna hong ngen ka hih manin kei hong maizumsak kei in. Migilote maizumsak in la, amaute a pau ding theiloin Leinuai-ah paisak in
Thumante' langah pang a, kihihsak pau-in, kiphatsakna leh simmawhna tawh pau-in zuauthu a gen mite a pau theiloin omsak in
Nang hong zahtakte-a' dingin na koihsa na hoihte, nang hong beelte-a' dingin mite' muhna-ah na bawl, nangma hoihna kicing a, mi khempeuh in thei uh hi
Mite' sawmsimna panin na omna huam sungah amaute na seel a, kitotna mun panin na buk sungah a muan'huai-in amaute na kem hi
Gal in khuapi a umcih bangin kei hong ki-umcih hun lai-in a itna kip a lamdangin kei tungah hong lak ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
Lauthawngna tawh, “Nangma muhna panin a gamlapi-ah kei hong notkhia hi,” ka ci khin hi. Ahih hangin nang tungah huhna ka hong nget ciangin keima hong thumnate nangmah in na hong za hi
Ama mi siangtho khempeuh aw, Topa phat un! Pasian in thuman mite kem a, ahih hangin a kiphatsak gamtatte nakpi takin a thuk hi
Topa a ngak mi khempeuh aw, na tha uh khauhsak un la, na lungsim uh hangsak ta un!
